content.body: Nodes and edges each track traversal data. Nodes record: traversal_count (total visits) and unique_traverser_count (distinct actors). Edges record: traversal_count, rating_avg (1–5 average, null if no ratings), and rating_count. Traversals are recorded via POST /nodes/{id}/traverse or POST /edges/{id}/traverse in the REST API, or via the MCP tool traverse_edge. These numbers reflect actual knowledge usage frequency, not just what was recorded.
